title: 9. **PromptBase AI-powered Content**
summary:
What it is: A service that utilizes Claude AI and local Ollama LLMs to create high-quality content, such as blog posts and social media posts, for sale on PromptBase.
Revenue model: The service will earn revenue through sales of content on PromptBase, with payments collected through Stripe.
Time to first dollar: 1-2 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by creating a sample piece of content using Claude AI and local Ollama LLMs, and setting up a PromptBase store.
